emails.subject: Forward Ob test run
emails.body: Forward Ob test run I'd be more than happy to run a test of the new forward obligation report in order for you to move it to production. I do use the application everyday when determining the West desk positions in relation to each other, so it's a report I'm familiar with and also one that may affect me if it's changed. Please let me know if you'd like me to run the report and under what terms. Thanks, Kate Symes Trading Support 503-464-7486

emails.subject: RE: Forward Ob test run
emails.body: RE: Forward Ob test run Thanks Kate, We were looking for somebody like you. You can run it with any settings, as you run it every day. Make sure you see version 3.0.0.30. I think however it is better if you can run the report against production data because the test data are not good enough. I think David Poston created a shortcut on Cara's and Valarie's computers, you can talk to him to do it for you as well. The command from the command prompt should be: C:\Enpower\stage FwdObl user_id user_password pwrprodn_ded (ask the IT people if this doesn't mean anything to you, I can phone David as well you want me to) Thanks, Kroum 713-853-9980

emails.subject: RE: Forward Ob test run
emails.body: Good morning Just wanted to let you know that I've been running the stage version of the Forward Obligation report using production data, and I seem to be getting all the same numbers as I do with the production version of the report. I will continue to compare the two today when I run these reports, just to make sure. But in the meantime, all looks well. Thanks for your help. Kate Symes Trading Support 503-464-7486
